rules.confirmed_opposite_signal: Close when the fresh model produces a full signal opposite to the open scenario.

directional_invalidation.long: Close when fresh score is <= -15 and at least two signal groups are negative.
directional_invalidation.short: Close when fresh score is >= 15 and at least two signal groups are positive.

rules.data_quality_failure: Keep the scenario open; never close only because fresh data are unavailable.
rules.execution_price: Use the last completed 5-minute bar at or before the daily review.
rules.sl_tp_monitoring: Independent SL/TP checks remain active and can close earlier.
